resources.string: Warning - To avoid rejection, Please ensure photo is clear and all 4 corners of ID proof are visible. \n\nकृपया सुनिश्चित करें कि फोटो स्पष्ट होनी चाहिए और आई-डी प्रूफ के सभी 4 कोनों के साथ पूरी जानकारी दिखाई दे |
Please capture your document in Given Frame with Clear Photo
Note - You can tap to Focus and swipe to adjust Brightness
This device does not support Camera
Camera permission is denied, therefore it could not be opened.
